<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="OGfytDhbYiE-8jmF8Xl9"> <mxGraphModel dx="4227" dy="2480" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="4200" pageHeight="1700" background="light-dark(#FFFFFF,#FFFFFF)" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="e1cE7iNQ7mUiWzFySeSp-18" parent="1" style="image;sketch=0;aspect=fixed;html=1;points=[];align=center;fontSize=12;image=img/lib/mscae/Docker.svg;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="173" width="210.98" x="3877" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart LR
 subgraph API_Layer [API Layer]
 Uvicorn[Uvicorn 8000]
 Endpoint[API Endpoint]
 Decorator[Decorator<br/>Intercepts Request]
 Logic[Business Logic]
 end

 subgraph LLM_Runtime [LLM Runtime]
 vLLM[vLLM Engine 5000]
 Weights[(Model Weights)]
 end

 subgraph Monitoring_Pipeline [Monitoring Pipeline]
 LangfuseWeb[Langfuse-Web 3000]
 Redis[Redis 6379]
 LangfuseWorker[Langfuse-Worker 3030]
 end

 subgraph Storage [Storage]
 Minio[(Minio 9000)]
 Postgres[(Postgres 5432)]
 Clickhouse[(Clickhouse 8123)]
 end

 Client((Client)) -->|1. HTTP Request| Uvicorn
 Uvicorn --> Endpoint
 Endpoint --> Decorator
 Decorator --> Logic
 Decorator -.->|2. Async Trace Start| LangfuseWeb
 Logic -->|3. Inference Request| vLLM
 vLLM --> Weights
 vLLM -->|4. Inference Response| Logic
 Logic -->|5. Return Response| Decorator
 Decorator -->|6. Final Response| Endpoint
 Endpoint -->|7. HTTP Response| Client
 
 LangfuseWeb --> Redis
 Redis --> LangfuseWorker
 LangfuseWorker --> Minio
 LangfuseWorker --> Postgres
 LangfuseWorker --> Clickhouse

 style Decorator fill:#f96,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
 style LangfuseWeb fill:#bbf,stroke:#333
 style LangfuseWorker fill:#bbf,stroke:#333
 style vLLM fill:#dfd,stroke:#333
 style Client fill:#fff,stroke:#333,stroke-dasharray: 5 5",
 "config": null

mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart LR
 subgraph External
 direction TB
 DNS[(\"DNS / Cloudflare\")]
 end

 subgraph Infrastructure
 direction TB
 ReverseProxy[/\"Reverse Proxy\"/]
 LB{{\"Load Balancer\"}}
 end

 subgraph Application
 direction TB
 Frontend[\"<b>Frontend</b><br/>(Main Application)\"]
 end

 DNS -->|Request| ReverseProxy
 ReverseProxy -->|Forward| LB
 LB -->|Traffic| Frontend
 Frontend -->|Response| LB
 LB -->|Process| ReverseProxy
 ReverseProxy -->|Final Response| DNS

 style DNS fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px,width:200px,height:100px
 style ReverseProxy fill:#f96,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px,width:200px,height:100px
 style LB fill:#ddd,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px,width:200px,height:100px
 style Frontend fill:#dfd,stroke:#333,stroke-width:4px,width:250px,height:150px

 linkStyle 0,1,2,3,4,5 stroke-width:3px",
 "config": null
